rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MANGAN VS. KEY MORTGAGE CORP DBA KMC MORTGAGE CORP
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Gmac Mortgage Llc, Ets Services Llc And Mortgage Leectronic Registration Systems, Inc.S' Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 16, 2012, line 1. Defendants Gmac Mortgage Llc, Ets Services Llc And Mortgage Leectronic Registration Systems, Inc.S' Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Second Amended Complaint. Continued to May 11, 2012 to be heard in conjunction with Motion for Leave to Amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KNOBBE, MARTENS, OLSON & BEAR, LLP VS. ROBERT MICHAEL HOFFMAN AKA MICHAEL HOFFMAN, AN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 16, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT ROBERT MICHAEL HOFFMAN AKA MICHAEL HOFFMAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar, untimley, subject to CCP 1005. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM ORELLANA VS. CARLOS MADRID et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 16, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANTs CARLOS MADRID and OSCAR MELENDEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. Fails to state to facts sufficient for cause of action only basis for demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. VINCENT TRUEHILL et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 16, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT VINCENT TRUEHILL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. Complaint sufficient re exemption from San Francisco Rent Ordinance. See paragraph 15 of Complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MALENA E REED VS. SHUN XIANG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 16, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANTs SHUN XIANG and CAIYUN YANG's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend. Notices not attached. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RALAN WONG VS. TIFFANY BARBER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 16, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANTs TIFFANY BARBER, SARAH SHARAF and MATT PINNA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. Factual duspute should be resolved at Motion for Summary Judgment/Motion for Summary Adjudication or trial. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. BUSHRA KHANSHALI et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 16, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANTs BUSHRA KHANSHALI and SABAH KHANSHALI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. Complaint sufficient re exemption from San Francisco Rent Ordinance. See paragraph 15 of Complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN L. VAN NOORD et al VS. SARAH M. LEWIS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 16, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT SARAH LEWIS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Deny, untimely and if heard moving party failed to provide competent evidence to shift burden. Five days to plead. = (501/REQ)
